summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Olivo Cards final corrections. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all requested features: subscription check for card creation, PayPal dual credentials (Sandbox/Live), mode selector, and subscription checkout flow.
passed_tests: Backend: Users without subscription get 403 when trying to create cards
Backend: Error message contains subscription requirement text
Backend: PayPal settings endpoint returns dual credentials (sandbox/live)
Backend: PayPal mode field exists and is valid (sandbox/live)
Backend: PayPal settings can be updated with mode
Backend: Public PayPal client ID endpoint returns mode and has_secret
Backend: PayPal subscription creation returns approval_url
Backend: Approval URL points to sandbox.paypal.com in sandbox mode
Backend: Single plan can be synced with PayPal
Backend: All plans can be synced with PayPal
Backend: PayPal plan IDs can be reset for re-sync
Backend: Plan details include paypal_plan_id field
Backend: Plans endpoint returns all required fields
Backend: Current subscription endpoint works
Backend: Integration test - complete subscription check flow
Frontend: Login and navigation working
Frontend: Admin settings page accessible
Frontend: PayPal configuration section visible
Frontend: Mode selector (Sandbox/Live) visible and functional
Frontend: Sandbox credentials section visible with inputs
Frontend: Live credentials section visible with inputs
Frontend: Save PayPal settings button present
Frontend: Re-sync plans button present
Frontend: User without subscription sees 'Suscripción Requerida' message
Frontend: Subscription required page has link to plans
Frontend: Subscription page shows 3 plans correctly
Frontend: Trial period (15 días gratis) badge displayed on Básico plan
Frontend: Checkout section displays on plan selection
Frontend: Recurring payment notice displayed
Frontend: PayPal subscribe button displayed
context_for_next_testing_agent: All final corrections verified: 1) Users without subscription see 'Suscripción Requerida' and backend returns 403, 2) PayPal settings has BOTH Sandbox and Live credentials with mode selector, 3) Re-sync plans button available, 4) PayPal subscription creation returns valid approval_url pointing to sandbox.paypal.com. Plans: Básico=$2.99 (15 días trial), Profesional=$9.99 (popular), Empresarial=$29.99.
